creator: ngie@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Alexander Motin from comment #1)
> That looks quite odd to me. I don't remember I've seen such messages when
> tested it last time. And the message "Raw sense" I can't even find in
> sources. Am I looking wrong? Is it clean FreeBSD?

Good question. Some of the extra debug output is coming a custom kernel (sorry... can't share the sources :/), so it might not be 100% valid on vanilla FreeBSD.
